title: Intense Croatian Chicken Stew
description: A hearty, winey stew with ginger and a mother-sauce base that is gentle on kids and low in sodium.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat until shimmering.
Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and ginger paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the diced carrot and red bell pepper, cooking until slightly softened, about 5 minutes.
Mix in the tomato paste and dried oregano, stirring to coat the vegetables.
Pour in the white wine, deglazing the pot and letting it reduce for 2 minutes.
Add the chicken thighs, then pour the low-sodium chicken broth, bringing the mixture to a simmer.
Cover the pot and let the stew cook on low heat for 35 minutes, or until the chicken is tender.
Remove the lid and simmer uncovered for an additional 5 minutes to thicken the sauce.
Season with a pinch of salt if desired, then stir in the chopped fresh parsley before serving.
